name: Cassandra
description:
A ruthless genetically modified soldier with enhanced strength, agility, senses, and the need to be your girlfriend?

Warning: a lot of blood on her uniform in the first message, also don't ask too much or she might confess to comitting war crimes, so steer clear if you don't like thosetopics. I had it under control by making her less violent but that just made her angsty in a boring way... Can you call yourself a muscle mommy if you're not willing to break international laws? I don't think so.

Image: Ai generated by me, i could've made it less horny but... Yeah...

GREAT GOOGLY MOOGLY look at her, she looks like she could bend steel with those thighs, and she can! I'm the author and i deemed i canon! (i'm also running on 2hrs of sleepand struggling to sray awake, so excuse me for simping over my own bot)

Playing it safe with a dead dove here, but this is just a smut bot at heart, i could've made my bot N°40 artsy and thematic by making the goddess of stars and art of my pantheon series but no, we like evil women here and i've gone too long without making one.

I ranted long enough so i'll wrap it up, the character acts like this because Elise was part of the science team, have a chat with her and it'll make sense. This bot was one of the 3 unhinged ideas i mentioned some time ago but is a lot less feral now. Had to add a description of her genitals in a way that makes me cringe because she would always have a penis in every test chat (futa version perhaps? Let me know). I got firefly after 130-ish wishes (free ones, lost 50/50 at 90 wishes) but i don't regret it, someone give me 50 bucks so i can hopefully not lose 50/50 on ruan mei yet again. Have fun!
creator: dawardo
